description: Use of __proto__ manipulation for array methods, which can be slow and has compatibility issues with some JavaScript engines
suggested_fix: Use Object.setPrototypeOf() or direct method definition instead of __proto__ manipulation

description: Magic number NO_INITIAL_VALUE used as sentinel value, could be replaced with undefined for clarity
suggested_fix: Replace NO_INITIAL_VALUE with undefined and adjust logic accordingly

description: Potential prototype pollution vulnerability - Object.defineProperty is used without proper validation of property descriptors
suggested_fix: Add validation to ensure only intended properties are defined

description: Child observer creation inside getter can cause memory leaks if not properly cleaned up
suggested_fix: Implement proper cleanup mechanism for child observers

description: set() function doesn't handle cases where target is frozen or sealed properly
suggested_fix: Add proper error handling for frozen/sealed objects

description: Hardcoded regex patterns for directive parsing that may not handle all edge cases
suggested_fix: Consider using a more robust parsing approach or comprehensive test coverage

description: Repeated string operations in parseHTML callbacks can be expensive for large templates
suggested_fix: Optimize string operations and consider caching results

description: Potential XSS vulnerability - template parsing doesn't properly sanitize user input in dynamic arguments
suggested_fix: Implement proper sanitization for dynamic arguments in template expressions

description: Complex nested conditionals and lack of early returns make the code harder to read
suggested_fix: Refactor to use early returns and reduce nesting

description: Inefficient array filtering in closeElement function called repeatedly
suggested_fix: Optimize the filtering logic or cache results when possible

description: Vue constructor function is created without proper TypeScript types, leading to @ts-expect-error comments
suggested_fix: Provide proper TypeScript typing for the Vue constructor

description: Use of function type assertions instead of proper type definitions
suggested_fix: Define proper interfaces for mixin functions

description: Global uid counter accessed on every instance initialization, could become contention point in highly concurrent environments
suggested_fix: Consider using a more efficient unique ID generation strategy

description: Complex conditional logic for option merging could be simplified
suggested_fix: Refactor option merging logic to be more readable and maintainable

description: Missing validation for options parameter type and structure
suggested_fix: Add proper validation for options object

description: Linear search in removeSub method (indexOf) can be slow for large subscriber lists
suggested_fix: Use a Set or Map for faster lookups and removals

description: Manual array filtering in notify method creates unnecessary garbage
suggested_fix: Optimize the notification logic to avoid creating intermediate arrays

description: Sorting subscribers in development mode adds overhead and may hide performance issues
suggested_fix: Ensure proper ordering without runtime sorting, or make it optional

description: Utility functions are spread across multiple files making it harder to find and maintain them
suggested_fix: Consider consolidating utility functions into a single well-organized module

description: Cached functions used extensively but without proper cache invalidation strategies
suggested_fix: Implement cache invalidation for functions that depend on changing state

description: Code generation for templates doesn't properly escape all potentially dangerous expressions
suggested_fix: Implement comprehensive escaping for all user-provided expressions in templates
